message:
Upgrade dependencies: bitflags, fancy-regex, time, proptest, and others

Direct dependency changes in Cargo.toml:
- bitflags: 2.10 -> 2.11
- fancy-regex: 0.14.0 -> 0.17.0 (major version bump within 0.x)
- time: 0.3.36 -> 0.3.47
- proptest: 1.6 -> 1.10
- tracing-test: 0.2.5 -> 0.2.6
- Relaxed version pins for tracing (0.1.44 -> 0.1),
  tracing-subscriber (0.3.22 -> 0.3), and test-log (0.2.19 -> 0.2)

Notable transitive dependency updates in Cargo.lock:
- clap: 4.5.54 -> 4.5.60, clap_lex: 0.7.7 -> 1.0.0
- regex: 1.12.2 -> 1.12.3, regex-automata: 0.4.13 -> 0.4.14
- syn: 2.0.114 -> 2.0.117, proc-macro2: 1.0.105 -> 1.0.106
- zerocopy: 0.8.33 -> 0.8.39
- libc: 0.2.180 -> 0.2.182, memchr: 2.7.6 -> 2.8.0
- futures-*: 0.3.31 -> 0.3.32 (pin-utils dep removed)
- tempfile: 3.24.0 -> 3.25.0, insta: 1.46.1 -> 1.46.3
- criterion: 0.8.1 -> 0.8.2, env_logger: 0.11.8 -> 0.11.9
- env_filter: 0.1.4 -> 1.0.0 (major, transitive only)
- zmij: 1.0.16 -> 1.0.21
- time: 0.3.45 -> 0.3.47, num-conv: 0.1.0 -> 0.2.0
- New transitive deps: wasip3, wasm-encoder, wasm-metadata,
  wasmparser, wit-bindgen-*, wit-component, wit-parser,
  prettyplease, heck, id-arena, leb128fmt, unicode-xid,
  getrandom 0.4.1, foldhash 0.1.5, hashbrown 0.15.5

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
